human_actions_pending.action: None immediate — Phase 3 is fully human-verified and closed. Phase 4 discussion is the next step.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 (System View) has no CONTEXT.md yet. Standard flow: /gsd:discuss-phase 4 to lock decisions, then /gsd:plan-phase 4, then /gsd:execute-phase 4.

session_lessons.lesson: ip-api's default JSON response OMITS fields like `offset`. Always request them explicitly via ?fields=... query param. The default response includes only: status, country, countryCode, region, regionName, city, zip, lat, lon, timezone, isp, org, as, query.
session_lessons.evidence: Plan 03-02 shipped assuming loc.get('offset') would return a value from the default response. On-device verify showed tz_offset.txt was never created and Clock stayed at --:-- indefinitely. Root cause: default response has no `offset` key, so loc.get returned None, set_tz_offset(None) no-op'd. Fix: change URL to http://ip-api.com/json/?fields=lat,lon,offset (commit c23bb5a).

session_lessons.lesson: For any 'symmetric with Phase X' pattern reuse, still trace all state transitions on-paper. The Plan 03-02 D-31 mirror was structurally correct but assumed offset was always available — which required the URL fix upstream. Symmetry doesn't guarantee upstream inputs match assumptions.
session_lessons.evidence: Same commit c23bb5a — the plan's threat model was thorough but did not enumerate 'what if the field ip-api returns is None instead of an int'. Belt-and-suspenders None-guard in set_tz_offset saved from a crash but hid the bug for a full verify cycle.

session_lessons.lesson: Human-verify caught a design defect (manual TZ_OFFSET was too brittle) that automated verification could not have. Even for MicroPython on-device projects with only automated verify at the Python-parse level, budget human-verify time for UX-shaped surprises.
session_lessons.evidence: User feedback after Plan 03-01 human-verify: 'timezone is wrong. use location to get the right timezone'. Triggered Plan 03-02 gap-closure — 4 files + 3 doc files touched, 7-commit lineage.

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 4 to gather context for the System View phase. SYSTEM-01..04 cover WiFi diagnostics: connected SSID, IP address, signal strength (dBm or bars), and offline-state clarity. Phase 4 is the last v1 phase.
context_notes: Working tree is clean; 44 commits ahead of origin/main; no local WIP. All three completed phases (1, 2, 2.1, 3) have VERIFICATION.md files. Phase 4 discussion should reuse patterns from Phase 3's discuss-phase: single boolean state where possible (mirror _synced/_cached_tz_offset), pure predicates with main.py gating, D-33 stamp-at-start for any network calls. System view content stays in rows 0-53 per Phase 2 D-19. No secrets.py rotation is currently needed. The Python 3 ast.parse checks + grep-based verify assertions have been the workhorse for MicroPython automated verify — continue that pattern.
